framework.name: AWS contributing to agent identity frameworks
framework.description: Vineeth Sai Narajala, Application Security Engineer at AWS, co-authoring agent identity research. Confirms Amazon's involvement extends beyond IETF drafts into CSA working groups.
framework.raw_quote: Vineeth Sai Narajala2, Application Security Engineer, Amazon Web Services

source.title: A Novel Zero-Trust Identity Framework for Agentic AI - arXiv
